name: vibe-build
description: Vibe Build implementation skill pack for taking a product from PRD to working code via two tracks: a mockup track (scaffold → mockup-plan → mockup-build, aided by frontend-ui-engineering) and a build track (roadmap → plan → build).

interface.shortDescription: Build a new app or web product from PRD to working code.
interface.longDescription: Vibe Build bundles a staged implementation workflow that continues from a finished PRD. It splits into two tracks: a mockup track (scaffold the app, plan screens, build screen-by-screen mockups with frontend-ui-engineering) and a build track (frontend-first roadmap, per-milestone planning, and task-by-task building).
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me build a new app or web service with the Vibe Build workflow.
